reasoning: Stub critic (autonomous run, 2026-05-31): Phase C Task C1 ships autoscaling/v2 HorizontalPodAutoscalers for the two customer-facing Next.js Deployments (chiefaia-wizard + chiefaia-dashboard). Both HPAs are structurally symmetric: minReplicas:1, maxReplicas:5, CPU 70% AND memory 80% averageUtilization, behavior block with 60s up-stabilisation + 300s down-stabilisation. The 300s scale-down window is intentionally matched to the wizard's median session length so in-flight SSE/WebSocket interviews are not evicted mid-step by an over-eager downscale event. Reuse-first: built-in autoscaling/v2 + metrics-server already running in kube-system; no CRDs, no Helm chart, no parallel autoscaler. No @caia/ui surface (infra-only). Custom-metric HPAs deliberately deferred to C8 (which installs Prometheus). KEDA deliberately deferred (no NATS queue depth signal worth scaling on for V1). 13 new vitest cases (35 assertions) cover apiVersion+kind, scaleTargetRef, replica band, thresholds, labels, anti-flap behavior block, and cross-manifest symmetry. Subscription-only LLM discipline: this PR adds no LLM calls. Operator should run live submitPlan against @caia/ea-architect before True-Zero admin-merge.
